a:r.a:t: Marketing | Key roles and incentive drivers
Generate tour bookings through off-property engagement
Secure qualified prospects into the tour pipeline
Lead volume emphasis vs qualified conversion outcomes
Misalignment in what is considered a “good lead” across functions
Limited downstream control over tour and VPG outcomes
Complexity in outcome attribution across channels
Independent levers used across marketing, telemarketing, and sales
Drive penetration and tour flow at site level
Monitor tour volume, cost per tour, and follow-up cadence
Coach team to balance volume and quality outcomes
Develop and manage key marketing programs
Manage tour flow, VPG, net sales volume, and profitability performance as it relates to marketing programs
Generating Demand and Influencing Downstream Quality
